Home › DMCA / Content Removal

DMCA / Content Removal

PlayArcadeX respects the intellectual property rights of others. Games on this site are distributed through our partner GameMonetize, and we will promptly address valid copyright concerns.

Filing a notice

If you believe content on this site infringes your copyright, send a notice to contact@playarcadex.com including:

1) identification of the copyrighted work; 2) the exact URL(s) on https://playarcadex.com where it appears; 3) your contact information; 4) a statement of good-faith belief that the use is not authorized; 5) a statement, under penalty of perjury, that the information is accurate and you are the rights holder or authorized to act on their behalf; 6) your physical or electronic signature.

What happens next

Upon receiving a valid notice we will remove or disable access to the content in question and, where applicable, forward the notice to the game's distributor.
